_comment: Human-blessed golden baseline for the fixed input (sample_data/MISM-2024-Results.pdf). Activated 2026-06-01 (LLM Council): the finder now runs this meet through the real pipeline with a club KNOWN to be in it (club_filter) so it exercises the full content path, and diffs the deterministic output against these numbers. cards/achievements use baseline.py's conservative regression diff (alarm below an absolute floor or under 60% of baseline). The structural fields (club_filter, parsed_swim_count, known_swimmers) are exact/structural invariants asserted by ground_truth.py. Raise/update these via PR ONLY (never auto-advanced) when an intended engine change moves them; an unexpected change is a deterministic regression finding.
